make_payments.description: If set to true, the invited user will be able to make payments from the shared account.

make_draft_payments.description: If set to true, the invited user will be able to make draft payments from the shared account.

view_balance.description: If set to true, the invited user will be able to view the account balance.

view_old_events.description: If set to true, the invited user will be able to view events from before the share was active.

view_new_events.description: If set to true, the invited user will be able to view events starting from the time the share became active.
